plugins.name: Linkding Bookmarks
plugins.description: Search, browse, and manage your Linkding bookmarks from the launcher.
plugins.author: Akinus21

plugins.name: Bitwarden Vault
plugins.description: Access your Bitwarden vault from the launcher. Auto-type login credentials with wtype.
plugins.author: Akinus21

plugins.name: Niri Keybinds
plugins.description: View and manage your Niri keybinds from a panel.
plugins.author: Akinus21

plugins.name: AKSprayPaint
plugins.description: Theme-aware wallpaper recoloring daemon. Auto-detects wallpaper, applies Noctalia theme colors via Oklch color transfer, and keeps the wallpaper in sync as themes change.
plugins.author: Akinus21

plugins.name: Task Manager
plugins.description: Manage systemd units, processes, services, timers, and startup items from Noctalia
plugins.author: Noctalia

plugins.name: Flatpak Manager
plugins.description: Full Flatpak management: search, install, uninstall, update, run, kill flatpaks with multiple remotes support
plugins.author: Noctalia
